# Step 5: Report Results

## Overview
Generate a comprehensive report of the conversion process, including success status, any issues encountered, and recommendations for improvement.

## Report Components
- Conversion status (success/failure/partial)
- Processing details (time, resources used)
- Output specifications (size, format, quality)
- Any warnings or limitations encountered
- Recommendations for optimization

## Success Criteria
- Output file created and accessible
- Content fidelity maintained
- Performance requirements met
- No critical errors during processing

## Error Reporting
- Detailed error messages with context
- Suggested remediation steps
- Alternative conversion approaches
- Dependency or configuration issues

## Performance Metrics
- Conversion time
- File size changes
- Quality metrics (when applicable)
- Resource utilization

## Limitations and Notes
- Format-specific constraints
- Quality trade-offs
- Platform-specific considerations
- Future improvement suggestions
